top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.molecule_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id
    FROM atom a
    JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id OR a.atom_id = c.atom_id2
    JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    WHERE a.element = 'H' AND b.bond_type = 'triple'
) carcinogenic_with_triple_h ON m.molecule_id = carcinogenic_with_triple_h.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

    WHERE a.element = 'H' AND b.bond_type = 'triple'
) h_trip...

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.molecule_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id
    FROM atom a
    JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id OR a.atom_id = c.atom_id2
    JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    WHERE a.element = 'H' AND b.bond_type = 'triple'
) carcinogenic_with_triple_h ON m.molecule_id = carcinogenic_with_triple_h.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';
